word: G5118 - τοσοῦτος - tosoûtos - tos-oo'-tos - As large

sections.paragraph:
τοσοῦτος - tosoutos - tos-oo'-tos

From τόσος tosos (so much; apparently from G3588 and G3739) and G3778 (including its variations); so vast as this, that is, such (in quantity, amount, number or space): - as large, so great (long, many, much), these many.
